snippet.title: Syntax
snippet.description:
Hosted by Wes Bos and Scott Tolinski since 2017, Syntax has published over 900 podcast episodes on full-stack web development, covering everything from HTML, CSS, JavaScript, server side languages, databases, deployment environments, and more.

In 2023 Syntax.fm joined forces with Level Up Tutorials adding 2000+ free video tutorials to our library.

Wes Bos is co-host of Syntax and a web development educator. Constantly learning, he creates web development courses focused on JavaScript, TypeScript, React, CSS, Node.js and whatever else comes his way.

Scott Tolinski is co-host of Syntax and the creator of Level Up Tutorials. In his free time Scott is a dedicated Bboy (breakdancer) & enjoys pushing himself athletically through dance, working out and snowboarding.

CJ joined the team to help make YouTube videos that dive deeper into topics covered on the podcast. He is a full stack software developer and the host of Coding Garden.

Syntax is brought to you by Sentry (https://sentry.io)

snippet.title: Garry Tan
snippet.description:
Hi, I'm Garry Tan —I'm President & CEO of Y Combinator. I'm a designer, engineer, and investor in early stage startups. Previously Founder & Managing Partner of Initialized Capital, an early stage venture capital fund that was earliest in Coinbase and Instacart. 

Before that, I was a a partner at Y Combinator. Invested in and directly worked with over 700 companies the earliest possible stage, often just an idea. I cofounded Posterous and helped build it to a world-class website used by millions. (Acquired by Twitter) I also helped build the engineering team for Palantir Technology's quant finance analysis platform, and designed the current Palantir logo and wordmark.

I love building things. Forbes Midas List 2019 through 2022 🚀

snippet.title: Sounds American
snippet.description:
Sounds American channel is created by people who are passionate about American English pronunciation, phonetics, phonic rules, and all things related to American accents. 
Whom are we kidding? We love teaching and we're doing it for fun! 

Will you start speaking like an American if you watch all our videos several times? Well, we don't know that. What we do know is that your accent will improve. Trust us, we helped hundreds of people all around the globe.

Fellow teachers! We'll be happy if you use Sounds American videos to supplement your own materials. Kind of an official note: we approve free non-commercial distribution of our videos, including embedding, link sharing, and downloading, except for re-uploading. 
Thank you and enjoy the show.

P.S. We use only organic sound in our videos. So yes, at least one of us speaks like that in real life. Maybe just a little faster.

snippet.title: Bryan Johnson
snippet.description:
Bryan Johnson is the world's most measured human. Johnson sold his company, Braintree Venmo, to PayPal for $800m in 2013. Through his Project Blueprint, Johnson has achieved metabolic health equal to the top 1.5% of 18 year olds, inflammation 66% lower than the average 10 year old, and reduced his speed of aging by the equivalent of 31 years. 

Johnson freely shares his protocols and data publicly for everyone to use. Project Blueprint, is an endeavor to achieve humanity and earth scale cooperation starting within Self. 

Johnson is also the founder of Kernel, creator of the world’s first mainstream non-invasive neuroimaging system; and OS Fund, where he invested $100M in the predictable engineering of atoms, molecules, and organisms. He is an outdoor adventure enthusiast, pilot, and author of children’s books, Code 7 and The Proto Project.

宋晏仁院長：在2014年前，自己是一位92公斤的胖子，差點面臨多種健康問題。後來，宋醫師開始研究營養醫學，將哈佛餐盤改良為適合國人、且更易執行的211減重餐盤，也將個人減重經驗集結成《終生瘦用211全平衡瘦身法》這本書，自出版以來幫助了不少在減重路上受苦的朋友。

snippet.title: Jimmy O Yang
snippet.description:
Jimmy O. Yang standup tour tickets: www.jimmycomedy.com/shows 

JIMMY O. YANG is a comedian, writer, and actor best known for starring in INTERIOR CHINATOWN, LOVE HARD, SILICON VALLEY, CRAZY RICH ASIANS & SPACE FORCE.

Jimmy’s standup specials GUESS HOW MUCH and GOOD DEAL both premiered on Amazon Prime to rave reviews, clips of which continue to go viral on social platforms with hundreds of millions of views.

In his memoir, HOW TO AMERICAN, Jimmy writes about his experience of coming to America as an immigrant from Hong Kong - from learning English through BET Rap City to secretly becoming a Strip Club DJ to disappointing his parents by pursuing stand up comedy.

Jimmy is also a founding member of Crab Club Inc., a production company dedicated to amplifying original, authentic, and diverse voices in both TV and film projects. Alongside his partners Jessica Gao and Ken Cheng, Jimmy continues to champion inclusivity and representation in the industry.

snippet.title: Hikaru Utada
snippet.description:
Hikaru Utada Official YouTube Channel

宇多田ヒカル
(うただひかる　Hikaru Utada)
シンガー・ソングライター

1998年12月9日にリリースされたデビューシングル「Automatic/time will tell」はダブルミリオンセールスを記録、15歳にして一躍トップアーティストの仲間入りを果たす。

そのわずか数か月後にリリースされたファーストアルバム「First Love」はCDセールス日本記録を樹立。いまだその記録は破られていない。アルバムはすべてチャート1位を獲得。

2022年に発表した8枚目のオリジナルアルバム「BADモード」は国内外から高い評価を受け、海外音楽メディアPitchforkにて年間ベストアルバム入りを果たす。宇多田ヒカルの楽曲にインスパイアを受けて制作されたNetflixシリーズ「First Love 初恋」が日本・アジアを中心に大ヒット。2023年1月19日(木)にはネットイベント「40代はいろいろ♫」を開催した。

2023年7月28日(金) 映画『キングダム 運命の炎』主題歌の「Gold ～また逢う日まで～」を配信リリース。翌1か月後には　「Gold　～また逢う日まで～ (Taku’s Twice Upon a Time Remix)」をリリースし、国内外のチャートに上位ランクイン。

2023年12月9日(土)デビュー25年を迎え、2024年4月10日　初のベストアルバム「SCIENCE FICTION」をリリース。6年ぶりの全国ツアー「SCIENCE FICTION TOUR 2024」を開催。9月1日のKアリーナ公演をもって閉幕。

2025年初旬には、「Electricity」を“Karen Nyame KG” “Arca” “Salute”といった世界的プロデューサーがRemixした楽曲をそれぞれリリース。

5月2日(金)には新曲「Mine or Yours」をリリース。

snippet.description:
Unchained: Your No-Hype Resource for All Things Crypto With Laura Shin

Stay ahead in the fast-paced world of crypto with Laura Shin, award-winning journalist and author of “The Cryptopians.” 

Twice a week on Unchained podcasts, Laura dives deep into how crypto assets and blockchains are transforming the very basis of trust in our society, from financial transactions to identity to making decisions in online communities.

Unchained is also home to:
- Bits + Bips: Weekly podcast exploring how crypto and macro collide one basis point at a time.
- The Chopping Block: Weekly insights from early-stage investors Tom Schmidt, Robert Lesher, Tarun Chitra, and Haseeb Qureshi.
- Uneasy Money: Three OG DeFi builders dive deep into the onchain economy.
- DEX in the City: Every week, three of crypto’s sharpest legal minds gather to unpack the latest developments in digital assets.

snippet.title: ByteQuest
snippet.description:
ByteQuest is a visual-first deep dive into the foundations of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning.

This channel focuses on explaining AI from first principles (including neural networks, deep learning architectures, optimization, mathematics, and core computer science concepts) in a clear and structured way.

If you want to understand how AI works behind the scenes (not just how to use it) this channel is for you.

Topics include:
• Neural Networks from scratch
• Deep Learning architectures (CNNs, ResNet, Transformers)
• Optimization and Regularization
• Linear Algebra and Calculus for ML
• Algorithms and Computational Foundations

Built for serious learners, engineers, and researchers.

New structured series coming soon.

snippet.title: 跟我一起来谈钱
snippet.description:
大家好！我是一名特许金融分析师 （CFA），也是一名美国注册会计师（CPA）。我在纽约生活和工作了十多年，一直从事资产管理相关行业。曾先后在四大会计师事务所和全球 AUM 排名前十的对冲基金以及私募基金担任要职。

开设这个频道，是想用轻松愉快的聊天方式，介绍理财 personal finance，投资 investing，金融 finance，税务 taxes，经济 economics，生活 life，以及一切和钱有关的话题 money related topics。我们生活在一个前所未有的时代：物质极大丰富，你却未必支付得起必需品（比如医疗、养老）；免费信息爆炸，大学教育却变成了奢侈品；美国失业率连创历史新低，薪资却停滞不前；人的寿命不断增长，却导致越来越多的人无法退休；社会学家不断探讨贫富悬殊的命题，财富前1%的人口却持有史无前例的90%社会财富。我们生活的时代，懂理财比以往任何时候都重要；财商低比以往任何一个时代都致命。

感谢朋友们关注我的频道。希望大家能通过了解这些内容，提高财商，共同进步，从容应对和钱有关的人生话题。

**************************************************************************************************************************
如果您想帮我把频道做的更好，欢迎点击如下链接打赏/One time Donation - Thank you!
https://www.paypal.com/cgi-bin/webscr?cmd=_s-xclick&hosted_button_id=DKB2QP4SD9T74&source=url

如果您想“和我一起来谈钱”，欢迎写电邮到 AskWei@chattymoney.com 来信请在标题注明“访谈”。正文内容请大致介绍您在哪方面有心得体会/经验教训/投资机会/理财历程，或其它一切跟钱有关系的有趣有料的话题。嘉宾不限纽约，我们可以远程face-time/电话会议等等。谢谢！

We work hard to fulfill our ambition: create the most engaging and successful language-learning experiences in the world.
For those who really want to learn our great coaches, our common-sense explanations, the way each language is carefully taught and the passion we infuse into every minute of your learning will make the difference. 
We offer the most beautiful and engaging digital language-learning programs anywhere as well as amazing face-to-face immersions that will transform you. Our Online Immersion puts you in front of our coaches from the comfort of your home. Our one-week immersions in Mexico City, Oaxaca, and Barcelona are unforgettable learning experiences.
From iPhone and computers screens to our beautifully restored houses, we deliver truly memorable experiences every day of the year.

snippet.title: Jason Lewis - Mind Amend
snippet.description:
I’ve been developing brainwave entrainment audio since 2006, specialising in isochronic tones for mental performance, relaxation, sleep, and sustained attention.

Each session is built around frequency patterns designed to support targeted mental states, combined with carefully selected sound to maintain engagement without distraction. The aim is to create reliable, repeatable sessions you can use as part of your daily routine.

Sessions are structured to be practical and easy to use, whether you need background support for work, a way to reset during the day, or something to help you switch off at night. You can listen actively or let them run in the background, depending on what suits you.

I read the comments, so feel free to ask questions or share feedback.

Jason Lewis
Mind Amend

About me: MindAmend.com/about-mind-amend
Learn more: MindAmend.com/brainwave-entrainment/isochronic-tones
Contact: jason@mindamend.com
